description: Fix three bugs in the Plugin SDK: (1) httpStatusToToolError marks non-transient 5xx errors (501, 505, 511, etc.) as retryable, causing agents to retry permanently-failing requests; (2) waitUntil silently discards predicate errors, producing a generic timeout message with no indication of why the predicate was failing; (3) setLocalStorage's iframe fallback silently discards write failures (QuotaExceededError), while the non-fallback path always logs write failures.

userStories.title: Fix httpStatusToToolError to mark non-transient 5xx errors as non-retryable
userStories.description: In httpStatusToToolError (fetch.ts), all status >= 500 errors are currently marked retryable=true. Permanent 5xx codes like 501 Not Implemented, 505 HTTP Version Not Supported, and 511 Network Authentication Required will never succeed on retry. Change the 5xx branch to only mark genuinely transient codes (500, 502, 503, 504) as retryable; all other 5xx codes get retryable=false. Add tests covering 501 and 505 status codes.
acceptanceCriteria: httpStatusToToolError with status 500 returns retryable=true (transient: server overload)
httpStatusToToolError with status 502 returns retryable=true (transient: bad gateway)
httpStatusToToolError with status 503 returns retryable=true (transient: service unavailable)
httpStatusToToolError with status 504 returns retryable=true (transient: gateway timeout)
httpStatusToToolError with status 501 returns retryable=false (permanent: not implemented)
httpStatusToToolError with status 505 returns retryable=false (permanent: HTTP version not supported)
httpStatusToToolError with status 511 returns retryable=false (permanent: network auth required)
fetch.test.ts has tests verifying 501 and 505 are non-retryable

userStories.title: Fix waitUntil to include last predicate error in timeout message
userStories.description: In waitUntil (timing.ts), the catch block in the check() closure silently discards predicate errors. When a predicate always throws (e.g., a programming error, broken DOM access), the caller receives only 'waitUntil: timed out after Nms waiting for predicate to return true' with no indication of why. Track the last thrown predicate error and append it to the timeout message. Add a test verifying the last predicate error appears in the timeout message.
acceptanceCriteria: When waitUntil times out and the predicate threw on every poll, the timeout error message contains information about the last predicate error
When waitUntil times out because predicate always returned false (no throws), the timeout error message is unchanged (no spurious error context)
When waitUntil succeeds, no predicate errors are exposed (they are intermediate polling failures)
timing.test.ts has a test: predicate that always throws causes timeout message to include the predicate error message

userStories.title: Fix setLocalStorage iframe fallback to log write failures
userStories.description: In setLocalStorage (storage.ts), when localStorage is deleted by the host app (e.g., Discord) and the iframe fallback is used, write failures (QuotaExceededError from the iframe's setItem) are silently swallowed by withIframeFallback's outer catch block. The non-fallback path always logs write failures via log.warn. Fix setLocalStorage to log a warning when the iframe fallback's setItem throws, matching the non-fallback path's diagnostic behavior. Add a test for this case.
acceptanceCriteria: When localStorage is unavailable and the iframe fallback is used, and the iframe's setItem throws QuotaExceededError, setLocalStorage emits a log.warn entry containing the key name
The existing 'emits log.warn when iframe fallback is used' test still passes (the initial 'using iframe fallback' warning still fires)
storage.test.ts has a test: iframe fallback setItem throws QuotaExceededError → log.warn is emitted with the key name
